claimText: India's first animal stem cell biobank and laboratory is located at the National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) in Hyderabad.
evidenceExcerpt: Located at the National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB), Hyderabad.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the location of India's first animal stem cell biobank.
distractorHooks: Located at Indian Veterinary Research Institute (IVRI), Bareilly

claimText: The animal stem cell biobank at NIAB focuses on regenerative medicine, cellular therapies for livestock, and disease modeling.
evidenceExcerpt: Focuses on regenerative medicine, cellular therapies for livestock, and disease modeling.
examUse: Statement-based question on the primary applications of the animal stem cell biobank.
distractorHooks: Focuses exclusively on human regenerative medicine
Aimed primarily at cloning endangered wildlife species

claimText: The animal stem cell biobank is supported by the National Biopharma Mission (NBM) under the Department of Biotechnology - BIRAC.
evidenceExcerpt: Supported by the National Biopharma Mission (NBM) under the Department of Biotechnology - BIRAC.
examUse: Statement-based question on the funding and supporting agency for the biobank.
distractorHooks: Supported by the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR)
Supported by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change

claimText: The National Biopharma Mission (NBM) is an industry-academia collaborative mission dedicated to biopharmaceutical development.
evidenceExcerpt: NBM is an industry-academia collaborative mission for biopharmaceutical development.
examUse: Statement-based question on the nature and objective of the National Biopharma Mission.
distractorHooks: It is a purely academic research initiative without industry involvement
It focuses exclusively on agricultural biotechnology and genetically modified crops
